title: Request: Do not place emoji on a new line when typing in a text area

posts.author: jaylen.barrett (jaylen.barrett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Per the support chat channel:
"I checked into this in further detail with some internal resources and this is confirmed to be expected behavior. "

It is not a streamlined experience for the emoji to be put on the following line + it seems like a bug from a user perspective although it is intentional.
